name: Ronglian Group
message: One of the leaders of China digital revolution, helping customers for digital business transformation. Providing global and local expertise on technology and industry to the world wide nterprise customers. Offering IT products, solutions and services to multiple industries and fields for more than 20 years. Supporting China life science research industry since 2005 and developed to healthcare industry. Listed in Shenzhen Stock Exchange with stock code 002642.
